Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naru Gwei]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Gwei is a Captain of the Skysworn sect and an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Gwei is present at the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Gwei can control the wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Gwei has filthy gray locks and burn scars on his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Gwei has two enormous emerald wings from his back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Gwei's wings are his Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan's madra blast hit Naru Gwei's wings and ripped him back over the abyss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Gwei is a green-armored Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Gwei wields a dark gray sword with a long, thick, notched blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Naru Gwei is expected to return soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Naru Gwei is a character with emerald wings who emits green nebulous madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Naru Gwei is the Skysworn Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Naru Gwei has burn scars on his face and wears old, battered armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Naru Gwei arrests people in the name of the Blackflame Empire and by authority of the emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Naru Gwei is a character present at the training session.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan completed a difficult task for Naru Gwei.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Naru Gwei is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Naru Gwei eats a finger-sized leaf.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Naru Gwei has emerald wings and can fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Naru Gwei has a burn over his eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon mentioned Naru Gwei might sense the elixir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon has traded blows with Naru Gwei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Naru Gwei spoke with a veiled Underlady and Chon Ma.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Gwei dumped Yerin and Eithan out of Stormrock.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Naru Gwei is the Skysworn Captain who designed Stormrock's proximity to Serpent’s Grave.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
